meaning: American Society for the Prevention of Cruelty to Animals 美国防止虐待动物协会
examples: What she did for goldfish was noticed and rewarded by the ASPCA.
Because she did these kind things, she won the 2016 ASPCA Kid of the Year.
Keep the number for the ASPCA Animal Poison Control Center handy. The number is (888) 426-4435.
The ASPCA is receiving offers to adopt the animals from other New York residents every day.
"Purchase costs are just the beginning, " says Gail Buchwald, senior vice president of the ASPCA's Adoption Center.
